## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Tests updated or added
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `python -m build` passes

## User Impact

- [ ] No user-facing SDK or CLI behavior changed
- [ ] User-facing behavior changed and migration notes were added

## Security Review

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or local state files with sensitive values were added
